prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words.

A young woman of extraordinary, almost unearthly beauty, slender to the point of fragility, with an ethereal presence that suggests a body barely tethered to the living world. Her frame is delicate and willowy, narrow shoulders, thin wrists, visible collarbones, conveying extreme physical frailty — she looks as though a strong wind could shatter her, yet her posture carries a quiet, unwavering dignity.

Face: Oval-shaped with refined, aristocratic bone structure. Porcelain-pale skin with an almost translucent quality, faint bluish veins visible at the temples and beneath the eyes. Large, luminous eyes the color of pale amber with flecks of dying gold, heavy-lidded and deep-set, carrying an expression of profound melancholy and piercing intelligence — eyes that have witnessed too many final words. Dark circles beneath them like smudged ink, lending a haunted beauty. Straight, delicate nose. Lips thin and naturally pale, tinged faintly with a muted rose, slightly parted as if perpetually listening to something no one else can hear. High, clean brow suggesting sharp intellect. A single thin trail of dried blood from the corner of her left ear, hinting at the physical toll of her resonance ability.

Hair: Floor-length ink-black hair, straight and impossibly fine like spun silk, with scattered streaks of premature white running through it like cracks in porcelain. Most of it falls loose down her back and pools slightly at her feet, while the front sections are loosely gathered with a simple bone-white hairpin carved in the shape of a withered flower — a motif of the dying world tree Guixu. Stray strands drift across her face as if moved by an unseen wind.

Attire: She wears layered robes in the style of Eastern classical antiquity, but weathered and fraying at the edges, telling the story of a long and punishing journey. The innermost layer is a pale, almost ghostly white silk robe that clings to her thin frame, its hems stained with faint rust-colored marks — old blood from internal hemorrhaging caused by resonance backlash. Over this, a flowing outer robe of deep ink-grey with a subtle watercolor-like gradient fading into ashen blue at the sleeves and hem, evoking the aesthetic of a fading ink wash painting. The fabric is embroidered with barely visible patterns of falling petals and withered root-like veins in silver-grey thread, symbolizing the dying Guixu tree. A wide sash of muted indigo wraps loosely around her waist, from which hangs a small, cracked jade pendant shaped like a leaf — representing the last leaf of Guixu. Her hands are wrapped in thin linen bandages from fingertips to mid-forearm, partially concealing hairline fractures and bruising beneath, the cost of channeling the emotions of the dead. She wears simple cloth shoes, pale and worn.

Additional details: Faint, ghostly wisps of translucent energy drift around her like barely visible spirits — residual echoes of the lingering words of the dead she has absorbed. One hand is slightly raised at her side, palm open, fingers trembling almost imperceptibly, as if reaching toward a voice only she can hear. Her overall silhouette evokes a figure caught between the worlds of the living and the dead — breathtakingly beautiful yet visibly breaking apart, magnetic charisma radiating from her stillness and sorrow.

Dreamcore atmosphere, cinematic-level detail, soft diffused lighting with a faintly surreal glow, ink wash painting color palette blended with photorealistic rendering, melancholic and hauntingly beautiful mood, Eastern classical fantasy aesthetic meets end-of-the-world elegy., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: 梦核氛围，电影级细节风格
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
